instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Sofia Li and your zip code is 78260. You are outgoing, organized, cautious, pessimistic.  You want to exchange your Bicycle to a larger frame size for your kid. Jigsaw Puzzle in the same order also needs to be exchanged, you want the same difficulty, but 1000 more pieces, and you prefer animal than art theme if both are available. Make sure you mention these at the same time.  You also want to exchange your camera to a slightly lower resolution, without changing the other options. If the agent asks for confirmation, mention that you'd prefer the other card as payment or refund method. Lastly, you want to cancel the skateboard order. If you cannot cancel one single item, you are okay with cancelling the whole order, with the reason of no longer needed.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: exchange your Bicycle to a larger frame size for your kid
dialogue_state.initial_query: Exchange my Bicycle for a larger frame size for my kid

hints.segment: exchange Jigsaw Puzzle in the same order for same difficulty but 1000 more pieces, prefer animal over art theme
hints.hint: Also exchange the Jigsaw Puzzle from the same order for one with the same difficulty but 1000 more pieces, and if there's a choice, I prefer an animal theme over art

hints.segment: exchange your camera to a slightly lower resolution, without changing other options
hints.hint: Exchange my camera for one with slightly lower resolution, but keep all other options the same

hints.segment: cancel the skateboard order, and if unable, cancel the whole order with reason 'no longer needed'
hints.hint: Cancel the skateboard order. If that's not possible, I am okay cancelling the whole order with reason 'no longer needed'
